message:
perf(widgets): wire set_fast into Block and Panel border rendering (bd-enia0)

Replace 24 buf.set() calls with buf.set_fast() in Block::render_borders,
Block::render_borders_ascii, and Panel::render_borders. Border cells are
always single-char width-1 glyphs, so set_fast's early-exit fast path
avoids the full set() overhead (scissor/opacity/wide-char checks) on
every border cell write.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
